variables.description: Equals one if subject appears in genotype files

variables.name: itwin
variables.description: Used to designate IDENTICAL individuals within families. variables.name: pedno
variables.description: The family number, present for all subjects found in the pedigree file, and absent for those not included in the pedigree file.
